You're on the list!

Hi {{params.owner_name}},

Thank you for joining the waitlist for {{params.brand_name}}. We're on a mission to ensure no digital asset is ever lost to time, and we're thrilled to have you as an early supporter.

Your Priority Position
#{{params.position}}

Our beta rollout is happening in stages. We'll send you another email as soon as we're ready for you to secure your first vault.

In the meantime, feel free to explore our Trust Center to learn more about our zero-knowledge security architecture.

Stay legendary,
The {{params.brand_name}} Team
